title: callista heterocarpa
intro: Callista heterocarpa, also known as the butterfly orchid or calistachys, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Callista heterocarpa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Callista heterocarpa can be made by infusing the roots in water or as a tea, and it is also used in some cases as a substitute for traditional antiviral medications.
